ask.title: Ask your library
ask.welcomeText: I ask across your papers and highlights at once, synthesize between them, and cite where each fact comes from.
ask.placeholder: Ask about your papers and highlights…
ask.unavailable: ⚠ AI is unavailable. Set GROQ_API_KEY on the server.
ask.error: ⚠ An error occurred while querying your library.
examples: What main topics does my library cover?
What research methods appear in my papers?
Summarize what I know about transformers
Are there contradictions between my sources?

deep.title: Deep Research
deep.subtitle: Choose a collection and the AI will generate a literature review: topics, methodologies, findings, contradictions and gaps.
deep.phase: Reading the papers and synthesizing patterns… this may take a few seconds.
deep.insufficient: This collection needs at least 2 papers to analyze.
deep.unavailable: AI is unavailable. Set GROQ_API_KEY on the server.
